message:
refactor(abi): migrate sockatmark, tcgetpgrp, getpass to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- sockatmark: sys_ioctl
- tcgetpgrp: sys_ioctl
- getpass: sys_open, sys_write, sys_ioctl

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 92 to 86.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,7 +188,7 @@
         "note": "Spawn-attribute signal-set roundtrips now use signal_abi helpers, and the closefrom fallback uses unistd_abi::sysconf."
       },
       "pthread_abi": {
-        "count": 61,
+        "count": 53,
         "functions": [
           "pthread_cond_broadcast_fn",
           "pthread_cond_destroy_fn",
@@ -199,17 +199,13 @@
           "pthread_create_fn",
           "pthread_detach_fn",
           "pthread_equal_fn",
-          "pthread_getspecific_fn",
           "pthread_join_fn",
-          "pthread_key_create_fn",
-          "pthread_key_delete_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_destroy_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_init_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_lock_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_trylock_fn",
           "pthread_mutex_unlock_fn",
           "pthread_self_raw",
-          "pthread_setspecific_fn",
           "pthread_cancel_raw",
           "pthread_create_raw",
           "pthread_create_with_managed_attr",
@@ -271,7 +267,7 @@
         "note": "Legacy regex register allocation now uses the ABI allocator path instead of direct libc calloc/free."
       }
     },
-    "total_call_throughs": 61,
+    "total_call_throughs": 53,
     "note": "Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh."
   }
 }
